## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve. Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

```typescript
// How would the feature be used?
```

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references that would help explain the feature.
